classifieds_148.POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE: The agent prematurely declared the task infeasible. While no item with an Amazon webpage in its image was found on the current page (page 17), the agent did not navigate through the available pagination (pages 15, 16, 18, 19, etc.) to check other listings before concluding that the item was not present. The objective implies that such an item exists, and the agent should have exhausted all reasonable search avenues.
classifieds_148.REFLECTION: When an objective requires finding a specific type of content that might be spread across multiple pages, always utilize pagination controls to navigate through all available pages before concluding that the required content is not present or the task is infeasible. Do not stop after checking only one page if more pages are available.
classifieds_148.raw_response:
POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE:
The agent prematurely declared the task infeasible. While no item with an Amazon webpage in its image was found on the current page (page 17), the agent did not navigate through the available pagination (pages 15, 16, 18, 19, etc.) to check other listings before concluding that the item was not present. The objective implies that such an item exists, and the agent should have exhausted all reasonable search avenues.

REFLECTION:
When an objective requires finding a specific type of content that might be spread across multiple pages, always utilize pagination controls to navigate through all available pages before concluding that the required content is not present or the task is infeasible. Do not stop after checking only one page if more pages are available.
